title: Countdown Timer
description: Create a countdown from 10 to 1 using a while loop.
problemStatement:
A `while` loop continues as long as a condition is true. Use a `while` loop to count down from `10` to `1`. After the countdown, print `"Blast off!"`.

**Expected Output:**
`10` 
`9` 
... 
`1` 
`Blast off!`
hints: In each loop, print the count and then decrease it by 1 (`count -= 1`).
The loop should stop when `count` is no longer greater than 0.
solutionCode:
count = 10
while count > 0:
    print(count)
    count -= 1
print('Blast off!')
